argv: node --input-type=module --eval "import { createHash } from 'node:crypto'; import { readdir, readFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; const walk=async(d='.')=>{const out=[];for(const e of await readdir(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=(d==='.'?'':d+'/')+e.name;if(p==='.git'||p.startsWith('.git/')||p==='node_modules'||p.startsWith('node_modules/'))continue;if(e.isDirectory())out.push(...await walk(p));else if(e.isFile())out.push([p,createHash('sha256').update(await readFile(p)).digest('hex')]);}return out};console.log(JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries((await walk()).sort((a,b)=>a[0].localeCompare(b[0])))));"
label: effects-after-A03.007
